positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a stylized forest scene with delicate deciduous branches and simple woodland silhouettes. The scene is composed of interconnected, looping elements, featuring a central, winding river shape and various small forest floor details like mushrooms and scattered leaves. Style should be clean, sophisticated, and hand-drawn with thick and thin varying lines, reminiscent of Scandinavian woodblock prints and modern continuous line drawing. High contrast black on white background. Ideal for screen printing on apparel. Perfect symmetry and central placement. Composition should be circular or square, utilizing negative space effectively. Crisp, vectorized quality, no gradients or shading.
negative: blurry, low resolution, noise, watermark, text, signature, jpeg artifacts, messy, bad anatomy, gradient, solid background, photorealistic, 3d render, logo, trademark
